## Safety checklist

- [ ] I changed the canonical source instead of duplicating a rule in multiple Skills.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, tokens, or private exports.
- [ ] I did not write to Monday, DWH, CRM3, or other external systems as part of this PR.
- [ ] Month ceilings, card banks, and live-calendar authority remain unchanged unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Any behavior change has a golden regression or equivalent validation.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_department_tooling.py` passes.
- [ ] Relevant domain validators pass.
- [ ] I documented unresolved conflicts instead of silently choosing a source.
